heading: Restoration to former grade: retired warrant officers and enlisted members
label: 7345 Restoration to former grade: retired warrant officers and enlisted members
text: Each retired warrant officer or enlisted member of the Army who has been advanced on the retired list to a higher commissioned grade under , and who applies to the Secretary of the Army within three months after his advancement, shall, if the Secretary approves, be restored on the retired list to his former warrant officer or enlisted status, as the case may be.section 7344 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)396510:1006., .June 29, 1948, ch. 708, § 20462 Stat. 1086The words “hereafter”, “rank or”, and “shall thereafter be deemed to be enlisted or warrant officer personnel, as appropriate, for all purposes” are omitted as surplusage. The words “three months from ” and “whichever is later” are omitted as executed.June 29, 1948
